name: reizenlaw.com
message: At The Reizen Law Group we focus exclusively on personal injury law. This means that we have the skills, experience and insight necessary to aggressively advocate on behalf of accident victims. Whether you have been injured in a car accident, truck accident, motorcycle accident, slip and fall accident, boating accident, dog bite, or any other accident, we have the know how and experience necessary to maximize your recovery. Employees: 25 Revenue:$5 Million Industry:Legal Services Phone Number:(248) 554-3440
